texto: Is there anything courageous or brave about making the only possible choice that will save your life? When you're drowning, you grab any hand that's offered. To me, bravery is a spontaneous decision to save somebody else's life when your own is in danger.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Claire Sylvia que provoca enfrentar incertezas com ação. Ao questionar “Is there anything courageous or brave about making the only possible choice that will save your l…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre coragem, cellular-memory, memoir, com foco em memoir e transplant.
